content.body: It isn't about how unambigious our assessments are, we are obliged to follow the collective format.

Yeah, I was just trying to understand whether you are talking about an editorial or normative change. Sounds editorial which is good because it’s easier. I hope we can avoid duplicating the validation steps though.
i will join today's call 10 min late, apologies
meeting starting at https://meet.goto.com/ETSICYBER/crahypervisorsosverticals in 3 minutes, focusing on assessments
